lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear and has been meticulously maintained. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order, and the car is in like-new condition.
The car is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any scratches, chips, or dents. The interior is pristine and shows no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

Experience automotive excellence with this stunning, showroom-quality vehicle! It has been meticulously preserved and is in absolutely pristine condition, both inside and out. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a car that looks and feels brand new. Truly a masterpiece of care and maintenance!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts as expected. The interior is clean with only minor wear consistent with regular use, and the exterior shows a few small scratches but no major dents or rust. It comes with a complete service history and is a reliable choice for its next owner.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would serve well as a reliable daily driver for someone willing to put in a little work. The exterior shows its age with some noticeable sun fading on the hood and roof, along with a few minor door dings and a scuff on the rear bumper. Inside, the cabin is functional but shows wear; the driver's seat has a small tear in the upholstery and the carpet has some staining from regular use. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though it will likely need new brake pads in the next few thousand miles and the air conditioning isn't as cold as it used to be. It’s a solid, honest car that has been well-used and is priced to reflect its current state.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, currently offered in commendable condition. This unit demonstrates a consistent service history and robust mechanical integrity. The exterior retains its professional aesthetic, while the interior provides a refined driving environment. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of proven reliability and sophisticated performance.

Hi there! I'm looking to find a new home for my reliable ride. It’s been a fantastic car for me, super dependable and still looking sharp! I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready for you to drive away and enjoy immediately. Perfect for anyone looking for a solid, well-loved vehicle that's ready for its next adventure!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings. It maintains excellent mechanical compression and a responsive M-Variable limited-slip differential. Recent VANOS servicing ensures optimal valve timing across the rev range. While showing minor signs of road use consistent with its age, the drivetrain and suspension geometry remain dialed for precision handling. An ideal driver’s car for those prioritizing mechanical integrity and visceral feedback.
Reliable vehicle in good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean title. Interior well-maintained. Ready for daily use.

This well-maintained vehicle presents beautifully, featuring a glossy exterior finish and a clean, smoke-free interior with minimal wear on the premium upholstery. Mechanically sound and consistently serviced, it delivers a smooth, dependable driving experience with all electronic features and climate control fully operational. It has been garage-kept and remains free of any major blemishes, representing an excellent opportunity to own a reliable, high-quality car that has been treated with genuine care. Complete with a full service history and ready for the road.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a distinguished driving experience, balancing robust performance with long-term reliability. Demonstrating consistent care and mechanical integrity, this model serves as an exceptional investment for the discerning motorist who values both quality and value. We invite you to experience its superior handling and refined interior firsthand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience at a compelling price point. Fully inspected and ready for immediate delivery, this selection balances performance with enduring value.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape, runs like a dream, and has been super reliable for all my daily errands and road trips. It’s looking for a new home where it’ll be appreciated just as much as I have! If you're looking for a dependable ride that still looks great on the road, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Available is a 987.2-generation Cayman S, featuring the 3.4L Direct Fuel Injection (DFI) flat-six engine. This mid-engine platform offers superior polar moment of inertia, paired with a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle and a factory-spec mechanical limited-slip differential. The chassis remains taut, utilizing a MacPherson strut arrangement with upgraded polyurethane bushings for enhanced turn-in response. Braking performance is anchored by four-piston monoblock calipers
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Reliable runner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and performance. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only the minor, inevitable signs of careful road use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is free of tears or significant stains, and every button and switch operates with tactile precision. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, benefiting from a rigorous schedule of oil changes and preventative maintenance. The engine starts promptly and idles smoothly, while the transmission provides seamless transitions through every gear. It sits on a set of high-quality tires with ample tread remaining. This is a turnkey opportunity for a discerning buyer looking for a well-cared-for vehicle that looks and drives beautifully.

This vehicle offers an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a refined interior and a robust powertrain engineered for reliability. A premier choice for the discerning professional, this automobile delivers a sophisticated driving experience and represents a significant opportunity for quality-conscious buyers.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers dependable performance and a sophisticated road presence. Fully inspected to ensure operational excellence, it stands as a testament to quality ownership and enduring value.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-loved over the years. Perfect for someone looking for a reliable car that still looks great on the road. It runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure with you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Available is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This unit maintains excellent compression across all cylinders and benefits from a recent VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement for long-term reliability. The chassis remains rigid with proactive rear subframe reinforcement already completed. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential. Suspension geometry is optimized with fresh bushings and Bilstein dampers, ensuring the communicative handling characteristic of the M-division. While the exterior shows minor road wear consistent with enthusiast use, the drivetrain and underpinnings are dialed in for peak performance.
Good condition. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well. Regular maintenance performed.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers the perfect balance of performance and everyday luxury. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, showing only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery is supple, and all interior electronics—from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—operate exactly as they should. Mechanically, this car is turn-key ready. It boasts a documented service history, including a recent comprehensive multi-point inspection, fresh synthetic oil, and tires with substantial tread remaining. The engine is responsive and the transmission shifts smoothly, providing a confident and quiet ride. This is a well-cared-for example that has been kept in a climate-controlled garage and is ready to provide its next owner with years of reliable service.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it delivers a driving experience that balances performance with exceptional value. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate service, this offering stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a refined driving experience and proven reliability. Having undergone a rigorous professional assessment, this motorcar stands as a testament to quality stewardship and mechanical integrity. It represents a superior value proposition for those seeking a sophisticated blend of performance and prestige.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a fantastic car for me. It’s in really solid shape and runs like a dream—perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. I've taken good care of it, and it's ready for its next adventure! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offering a mechanically sound E46 M3 powered by the high-revving S54 inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. This example features a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for precise power delivery. Key preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a Vanos overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure chassis rigidity. The suspension utilizes refreshed bushings and upgraded dampers, maintaining the platform's signature neutral handling balance. While the aesthetics reflect a well-driven enthusiast car, the drivetrain remains robust with exceptional compression and sharp throttle response.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Recent oil change. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking reliability and style. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery remains supple and free of any significant blemishes, while every electronic feature—from the crisp infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule. It features a smooth-shifting transmission, a responsive engine, and a set of tires with substantial tread remaining. Recent service includes a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring it is road-trip ready. This is a well-cared-for example that balances performance with everyday practicality.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic refinement. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure optimal performance and structural integrity. Featuring a sophisticated interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a superior driving experience for the discerning professional. A premier selection for those seeking dependable quality and enduring value.
